name: Apple Pie - Crumb
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 tablespoons of sugar and 1 teaspoon of nutmeg.
2. Pour the mixture over thinly sliced apples placed in a pie pan lined with pastry.
3. In a bowl, combine 1 cup of flour and 1 cup of brown sugar. Add the butter and cut it in until crumbly.
4. Pour this crumb mixture over the apples.
5. Pour 3 tablespoons of milk on top.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees) until done.
